name: Bob - Multi-Repo PR Health Monitor
description: Production-grade GitHub PR health monitoring system with real-time WebSocket updates

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with repo, issues:write, pull_requests:write scopes

TARGET_REPOS.description: Comma-separated list of repositories to monitor (e.g., owner/repo1,owner/repo2)

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: GitHub OAuth App Client ID (create at https://github.com/settings/developers)

SECRET_KEY.description: Flask secret key for session management
